title: Solution
description: A definition to hold various settings for use in the frontend or the generator.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the schema for validation and migration support.

modelPath.description: Root path for model entities, replacing zone-specific paths.

basePath.description: Path where base entity files like DataSources are stored.

generatorTargets.description: Targets available to the generator when not explicitly specifying it.

GeneratorTarget.description: Defines a target that can be selected when using the generator.

sourcePath.description: A path relative to the folder where the the solution file lies.

outputPath.description: A path relative to the folder where the the solution file lies.
